category_sources: Official homepage describes Translate Shell as a command-line translator powered by several translation engines.
source_facts.description says it is a command-line translator using Google Translate and more.
docs_sources: Official man page is hosted under the same project domain and links to further documentation.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Translate Shell documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/soimort/translate-shell; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes terminal use, supported translation engines, POSIX systems, and GNU Awk dependency.
